questions.question: Simplify i^5.
questions.explanation: Since i^4 = 1, we have i^5 = i^4 · i = 1 · i = i.

questions.question: Add the complex numbers: (3 + 2i) + (5 - 4i).
questions.explanation: Combine real parts: 3 + 5 = 8. Combine imaginary parts: 2i - 4i = -2i. Result: 8 - 2i.

questions.question: Subtract: (7 + 3i) - (2 - 5i).
questions.explanation: Distribute the negative: (7 + 3i) + (-2 + 5i). Real parts: 7 - 2 = 5. Imaginary parts: 3i + 5i = 8i. Result: 5 + 8i.
